name: Oyster Beef B1
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef, sliced 1/4-in. thick (2 x 1 in. pieces)
1/2 cup Scallions, white sections, cut to 1 in. lengths
1 tbsp Each cornstarch and water, made into a paste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine salt, soy sauce, 1 tsp cornstarch, and sugar. Blend thoroughly.
2. Add sliced beef. Marinate for 5 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a wok or skillet. Add beef, scallions, and oyster sauce.
4. Toss-cook at high heat for 3 minutes.
5. Add chicken stock, MSG (if using), and cornstarch/water paste. Mix and toss until the gravy thickens and coats the beef and scallions.
6. Serve hot.
